name: pingpong-game
description: Multiplayer Ping Pong game with Express backend and React frontend

scripts.install:all: npm ci && cd server && npm ci && cd ../client && npm ci
scripts.dev: npm run dev --workspace=server & npm run dev --workspace=client
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace=server && npm run build --workspace=client
scripts.test: npm run test --workspace=server && npm run test --workspace=client
scripts.test:coverage: npm run test:coverage --workspace=server && npm run test:coverage --workspace=client
